title: clinopodium niveum
intro: Clinopodium niveum, also known as White Mint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae), characterized by its white flowers and distinctive minty aroma. Clinopodium niveum has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Clinopodium niveum include relief from nausea, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Clinopodium niveum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
